comments.text: Implemented interp-side operator dispatch for fz_op_eq/fz_op_neq/fz_op_lt/fz_op_lte/fz_op_gt/fz_op_gte in src/ir_interp/extern_call.rs by routing those extern names through the existing eval_binop semantics instead of dlsym. Re-enabled the corresponding fz2 CLI and fixture_matrix coverage. Validation: cargo fmt --all --check; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo test --test fz2_cli; cargo test -p fz --test fixture_matrix; cargo test --workspace.

title: Restore compiler2 interp comparison operator intrinsics after rebase
